description: Local-first Windows desktop app and CLI for querying local WeChat data.
post_install: # Fallback: the CLIs are static-CRT, so this normally does nothing. But if a
# machine somehow can't load the C runtime, install the VC++ redist for them.
Write-Host 'whywechat: C runtime not loadable; installing extras/vcredist2022 as a fallback...' -ForegroundColor Yellow
try { scoop bucket add extras *> $null; scoop install extras/vcredist2022 }
catch { Write-Host 'Auto-install failed. Run manually:  scoop bucket add extras; scoop install extras/vcredist2022' -ForegroundColor Red }
Write-Host 'whywechat: C runtime OK (static-linked) - no VC++ redistributable needed.' -ForegroundColor Green
notes: Start Windows WeChat and sign in before launching WhyWechat.
WhyWechat stores runtime config and DuckDB data under %APPDATA%\com.tricorelife.whywechat.manager.
Launch the GUI from the Start menu (WhyWechat), or run wx-pipeline serve and open http://127.0.0.1:8765/.
